```{=typst}
// ---- FAMILY A: Cover (page 1) ----
#wcg-cover()

// ---- Page 2: Welcome + brand manifesto + compact footer ----
#set page(numbering: none)
#wcg-fullbleed(c-sand)
#v(0.85in)
#align(center)[
  #wcg-logo(size: 0.9in, ink: c-deep, dot: c-gold)
  #v(0.32in)
  #text(font: ("Cormorant Garamond",), size: 30pt, weight: 700, fill: c-deep)[
    Small habits.\ Stronger money confidence.
  ]
  #v(0.2in)
  #text(font: ("Manrope",), size: 12pt, weight: 600, tracking: 5pt, fill: c-gold)[NOTICE.  PAUSE.  REPEAT.]
  #v(0.28in)
  #line(length: 15%, stroke: 0.75pt + c-gold)
  #v(0.28in)
  #block(width: 4.8in)[
    #set par(leading: 0.9em, justify: false)
    #text(font: ("Manrope",), size: 12.5pt, fill: c-ever)[
      Over seven short days, you will practice one simple skill: paying gentle
      attention to a few everyday money choices. No budget, no tracking every
      dollar, and nothing you have to give up.

      Financial well-being is not a single number — it is being able to meet your
      obligations, feel secure, and have the freedom to make choices, and it looks
      different for everyone.#super[1] This guide is simply a calmer way to see the
      small decisions you already make.
    ]
  ]
  #v(0.3in)
  #block(width: 4.9in, inset: (x: 22pt))[
    #text(font: ("Cormorant Garamond",), style: "italic", size: 21pt, fill: c-deep)[
      “There is nothing to fix here. \ There is only something to notice.”
    ]
  ]
]
#v(1fr)
#line(length: 100%, stroke: 0.6pt + c-taupe)
#v(7pt)
#align(center)[
  #text(font: ("Manrope",), size: 9.5pt, weight: 600, fill: c-deep)[The Wealth Confidence Guide · Version 4.0 · Published 2026]
  #v(3pt)
  #text(font: ("Manrope",), size: 9.5pt, fill: c-body)[#link("https://microsavingdaily.com")[microsavingdaily.com] · Copyright © 2026 Micro Saving Daily · Free to print for your personal use.]
]
#pagebreak()
```
